basics.name: Narain Karthik
basics.label: Full-stack developer
basics.summary: Full-stack developer and Cloud/DevOps practitioner focused on scalable, high-performance applications.

work.name: Vegas Consulting
work.summary: Experienced in developing high-complexity, scalable, data-driven front-end projects with a focus on performance, user experience, and system integration.
responsibilities: Developed scalable front-end applications using modern JavaScript frameworks, improving page load performance by up to 35%
Designed reusable and responsive UI components, reducing duplicate code and improving development efficiency by 30%
Optimized front-end performance, accessibility, and SEO, increasing Lighthouse scores by 25%+
Integrated business logic with data-driven user interfaces, reducing UI-related defects by 20%
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver production-ready features within defined timelines
achievements: Implemented CI/CD pipelines to automate build and deployment processes, reducing manual deployment effort by 60%
Managed cloud application deployments on Google Cloud Platform and Microsoft Azure, improving environment stability by 40%
Applied Git repository governance using branch protections and rulesets, reducing production issues caused by improper merges by 50%
Improved deployment reliability and release consistency through DevOps automation, decreasing rollback incidents by 30%

projects.name: Fit Track
projects.description: 🏋️ Full-stack MERN fitness tracker with responsive dashboards, streak analytics, and custom routine management for performance-focused workout tracking.

caseStudy.usage: 💪 Athletes log workouts, maintain streaks, and view progress insights across devices with fast, responsive analytics.
tradeoffs: ⚖️ MERN stack adds setup complexity but ensures scalability and full backend control.
📦 Redux Toolkit improves state responsiveness at the cost of slightly larger bundle size.
🎨 Material-UI speeds up consistent UI development with opinionated styling patterns.
technicalNeeds: 🗄️ Indexed Mongo collections for fast workout and analytics queries.
🔐 Express API with JWT authentication and REST endpoints for secure access.
🐳 Docker-Compose setup for consistent and reproducible dev environments.
DX: 🧩 Monorepo layout with shared scripts for streamlined development.
🧹 Linting, commit guidelines, and CI/CD pipelines for maintainable releases.
UX: 🧾 Schema-driven forms reduce input friction and improve consistency.
📱 Mobile-first charts and summaries encourage habit building and engagement.

projects.name: Sticky Memo
projects.description: 📝 Privacy-first note-taking app with offline storage, multiple view modes, and zero server dependency for distraction-free productivity.

caseStudy.usage: ⚡ Capture ideas quickly, switch between grid/kanban/table layouts, and export notes locally without cloud dependency.
tradeoffs: ⚖️ Offline storage improves privacy but limits sync and collaboration.
🪶 Lightweight formatting prioritizes speed and simplicity over advanced features.
technicalNeeds: 💾 IndexedDB/localStorage persistence with debounced writes for performance.
🧲 Drag-and-drop controllers for flexible note organisation.
DX: 📂 Clear folder structure with TypeScript models for maintainability.
⚙️ Simple build scripts and conventions for faster onboarding.
UX: ⚡ Instant response with low cognitive load.
🧩 Multiple views support different productivity workflows.

projects.name: Nmoji
projects.description: 😀 Emoji search and picker built with Astro and React, optimized for instant filtering, keyboard-first navigation, and extension-ready performance.

caseStudy.usage: ⌨️ Search thousands of emojis via keyboard and copy instantly for chats, content creation, or quick workflows.
tradeoffs: ⚖️ Bundled dataset increases payload but guarantees zero-latency search.
🧩 Simplified taxonomy keeps UI clean while limiting niche category depth.
technicalNeeds: 📚 Build-time index generation with fuzzy matching for instant results.
⚡ Astro static pages combined with React components for performance.
DX: 🧱 Astro+React hybrid provides small runtime with familiar workflows.
♻️ Reusable UI components and clear directory layout.
UX: ⌨️ Keyboard-first flow with immediate feedback for power users.

projects.name: Contribution Cards
projects.description: 👥 GitHub contributor directory with smart caching, filtering, and profile surfacing without requiring a backend service.

caseStudy.usage: 🔎 Aggregate contributor data, apply filters, and render profile cards efficiently while respecting API rate limits.
tradeoffs: ⚖️ Caching adds complexity but avoids GitHub API rate-limit issues.
📊 Simplified scoring favors clarity over deep analytics.
technicalNeeds: 🧠 Dual-layer cache with retry logic for resilience.
🔄 SWR pattern for efficient data fetching and revalidation.
DX: 🧩 Modular hooks and clear documentation for maintainability.
UX: ⚡ Instant filtering with consistent card layout for easy browsing.

projects.name: Readme Shop
projects.description: 📄 Interactive README builder with live Markdown preview, reusable templates, and badge components for faster developer documentation.

caseStudy.usage: 🧩 Compose documentation from templates, preview changes in real time, and copy or embed polished output instantly.
tradeoffs: ⚖️ Templates accelerate authoring but limit custom layouts.
🔄 Live preview requires continuous parsing during editing.
technicalNeeds: 📝 Markdown pipeline with Marked and DOMPurify for safe rendering.
🧠 Zustand store for lightweight global state management.
DX: 🚀 Semantic release and rich CLI scripts for smooth development cycles.
UX: 🧭 Guided assembly with responsive UI for better readability.
